improvement: Explicitly instruct the agent: 'All parameters that hold credentials, API keys, endpoints, or other sensitive values must be decorated with @secure() in both the calling module (main.bicep) and the receiving module. Verify this in both files during generation, not just the top-level orchestrator.'

finding: CRIT-01 — Storage Table Data Contributor missing
improvement: Add to the prompt or knowledge base: 'When configuring identity-based AzureWebJobsStorage with AzureWebJobsStorage__accountName, three RBAC roles are required on the host storage account: Storage Blob Data Contributor (ba92f5b4), Storage Queue Data Contributor (974c5e8b), and Storage Table Data Contributor (0a9a7e1f). All three must be assigned for the Functions v4 runtime to start successfully.'

area: GitHub Actions secret vs vars usage
finding: MAJ-02 — TRAPI credentials sourced from vars not secrets
improvement: Add to prompt: 'GitHub Actions environment variables that hold secrets or credentials must use secrets context (${{ secrets.NAME }}) not vars context (${{ vars.NAME }}). Vars are unmasked in logs and visible in the UI to anyone with write access.'

Add constraint: 'Do not hardcode functionAppScaleLimit unless explicitly requested. If a scale limit is needed, parameterize it with a default of 0 (platform default) so production deployments are not inadvertently throttled.'

finding: MIN-01 — RetentionInDays no-op on workspace-based component
improvement: Add to knowledge base: 'When App Insights uses IngestionMode: LogAnalytics, the RetentionInDays property on the Microsoft.Insights/components resource is ignored by Azure. Retention must be configured on the Log Analytics workspace resource instead.'

Add default: 'Key Vault provisioned with soft-delete enabled must also set enablePurgeProtection: true to prevent immediate permanent deletion during the retention window. Note the operational trade-off in comments.'

finding: MIN-03 — Container name duplicated as magic string
improvement: Add general rule: 'Any string that appears in more than one Bicep module (e.g., container name, SKU, tier) must be defined as a var in main.bicep and passed as a parameter to child modules. This prevents silent drift between modules that Bicep cannot detect at compile time.'
